ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shows" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each show */,
  "show_title" TEXT /* Title of the television show */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network broadcasting the show */,
  "show_genre" TEXT /* Genre of the show */,
  "show_type" TEXT /* Type of the show (e.g., series, miniseries) */,
  "first_aired" TEXT /* Date the show first aired */,
  "last_aired" TEXT /* Date the show last aired */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the show (e.g., ongoing, ended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shows_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the show associated with the season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year range of the season (e.g., 1997-98) */,
  "season_number" INTEGER /* Ordinal number of the season */,
  "season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_episodes" INTEGER /* Total number of episodes in the season */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Production company responsible for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewership" (
  "viewership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewership record */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season associated with the viewership data */,
  "number_of_viewers" TEXT /* Number of viewers in millions */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the show based on viewership */,
  "viewership_date" TEXT /* Date when the viewership data was recorded */,
  "viewership_source" TEXT /* Source of the viewership data */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the show for the season */,
  "total_ratings" INTEGER /* Total number of ratings received */,
  "viewership_trend" TEXT /* Trend indicator for viewership (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viewership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewership_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the network */,
  "network_type" TEXT /* Type of network (e.g., cable, broadcast) */,
  "network_website" TEXT /* Official website of the network */,
  "network_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the network */,
  "network_reach" TEXT /* Estimated reach of the network in terms of households */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating record */,
  "viewership_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the viewership record */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information related to the viewership */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was recorded */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating */,
  "rating_demographic" TEXT /* Detailed demographic breakdown */,
  "rating_score" REAL /* Numerical score of the rating */,
  "rating_trend" TEXT /* Trend indicator for the rating (e.g., improving, declining) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_viewership_id FOREIGN KEY ("viewership_id") REFERENCES viewership ("viewership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the show associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content or summary of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "report_author" TEXT /* Author of the report */,
  "report_audience" TEXT /* Intended audience for the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final, archived) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report's key findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)
